highlights: Golden dragon-shaped bridge spanning Han River, illuminated with colorful LED lights at night
Fire and water show Friday-Sunday at 9pm where dragon breathes flames then sprays water
Night market and riverside restaurants/cafés with outdoor seating near bridge

thingsToKnow.crowds: Very crowded during weekend fire and water shows. Arrive early (by 7:30pm) for good viewing spots. Less crowded on weekdays when bridge is lit but show doesn't occur.
thingsToKnow.safety: Safe and well-organized. Security visible during shows. Traffic closed 15 minutes before show starts.
thingsToKnow.accessibility: Easy access, free entry, no tickets required. Walkable across bridge or viewable from both riverbanks and nearby restaurants.
thingsToKnow.seasonal: Show may be cancelled or disrupted by special events (Christmas decorations blocked views during one visit). Check online for latest schedule.

visitorTips: Bring umbrella or raincoat if standing close to dragon's head during water show to avoid getting soaked
View show from a distance or nearby restaurants/cafés for better perspective of entire bridge than standing on it
Arrive 30+ minutes early on weekends to secure good viewing spot before 9pm show starts

faq.question: When does the fire and water show happen?
faq.answer: Every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday at 9:00pm. Show lasts approximately 10-15 minutes. Always verify online before visiting as shows may be cancelled.

faq.question: Where should I stand to watch the show?
faq.answer: View from both sides of streets, riverbanks, or nearby restaurants for best perspective. Avoid standing directly under dragon's head as fire is hot and water spray will drench you.

faq.question: Is there a cost to visit and what else is nearby?
faq.answer: Completely free. Night market operates nearby with food stalls and merchandise. Multiple restaurants and bars with outside seating available for dining while watching.

sentiment.positive: Most visitors find it an iconic Da Nang landmark worth seeing, especially the weekend fire and water show. Appreciated for architectural design, riverside location, accessible evening atmosphere, and family-friendly experience.
sentiment.negative: Some find the show overhyped with crowds too dense for short 10-15 minute performance. Fire portion brief compared to water spray. Not recommended if visiting weekdays when show doesn't occur.
